title: Iterate over borrowed collection wrappers
scenario: For loops over &OrderLines should borrow each line instead of consuming the wrapper.
instructions: The starter already supports owned IntoIterator. Implement IntoIterator for &OrderLines, yielding &OrderLine values.

hints.body: Implement the trait for &'a OrderLines with Item = &'a OrderLine.
Return self.iter() from into_iter so the for-loop behavior reuses the borrowed iterator method.
One complete solution for Iterate over borrowed collection wrappers is shown below.

completionExplanation: Borrowed IntoIterator enables `for line in &order_lines` while preserving owned iteration and the explicit iter method.
